sections.paragraph:
χωρέω [χώρα; ‘make use of space for movement’]

—1. ‘move forward to a position’ go, head for, w. εἰς Mt 15:17; in imagery 2 Pt 3:9.

—2. ‘be in a condition of having space’, hold, contain Mk 2:2; J 2:6; 21:25. In imagery, have/make room: of opening one’s heart to another 2 Cor 7:2; of securing space within one’s mind for divine instruction Mt 19:11f; J 8:37.
